def positive_repeated_attribute_chain_lookup_inside_tight_loop():
    rule_id = "repeated_attribute_chain_lookup_inside_tight_loop"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag tight loops that repeatedly traverse the same attribute chain instead of binding a local reference."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
